description: Department naming and tier map for AI Workforce Blueprint (29-department standard). Mandatory departments auto-build for every company (standard-unless-declined). A vertical pack contributes a UNIVERSAL FLOOR department to EVERY client ONLY when one of its depts is EXPLICITLY marked universal_primary=true — there is NO depts[0] fallback (removing the flag does NOT auto-promote the first dept). v2.6.1: the real-estate pack's first dept (listings) had its universal_primary flag REMOVED so listings is now industry-gated (real-estate clients only) and never lands on a generic/coaching/consulting floor; engineering (saas pack) stays universal_primary=true and remains a universal floor dept. The 6 universal-primary depts (one each from personal-pro-dev=presentations, service-industry=scheduling-dispatch, ecommerce=logistics-fulfillment, saas=engineering, agency=account-management, content-creator=podcast) plus 23 mandatory = 23+6=29 universal floor. Any pack dept WITHOUT universal_primary=true (now including listings) requires an industry keyword match and serves as flavor/extras on top of the 29. WS-4: wired into build-workforce.py apply_vertical_packs() and department-floor.py evaluate_floor(). Each vertical-pack department carries a base_suggested_roles file so it ships with real roles + SOPs and never hard-fails assert_dept_map_resolves; the Research dept's industry-analysis-specialist-mckinsey-style role refines it via the industry-org-design research manifest. Custom departments are added by owner request. Personal Assistant is now mandatory (floor raised to 24 — approved v10.15.42). General Task (catch-all routing fallback) + Project Architecture Office (PAO, project governance) added as mandatory depts, raising the floor to 26 (v11.1.0). Bugs + Healer (the self-repair immune system) added as mandatory depts, raising the floor to 28: every future client is born with both organs so nothing breaks quietly and the same bug never happens twice. Quality Control (the fleet-wide quality function that owns and runs the system analyzer) added as a mandatory dept: every company is born with the function that holds its own roles and procedures to the standard on two axes (is it real, is it specific enough to follow) and routes the failures it finds to the Healer. v2.6.2 (2026-07-16, operator ruling): Funnels added as a mandatory dept, raising the floor to 29. Skill 6's `06-ghl-install-pages/tools/cc_board.py` has always unconditionally stamped `department_slug='funnels'` for every `job_type='funnel'` card (job_type itself defaults to 'funnel') regardless of a client's declared industry/vertical — that stamp is not vertical-gated, so ONLY a mandatory (universal, not vertical-pack-gated) registration actually closes the live misroute (every funnel card on a standard-floor box was silently landing in the general-task catch-all via INGEST-06's unrecognized-slug tier). Registering it as an optional/vertical-pack dept would have left that bug live for any client who did not declare a matching vertical. Mirrors the same reasoning that made General Task mandatory: a universally-applicable routing target cannot be industry-gated. (Historical note: with QC the total was 29 when 7 universal primaries existed; v2.6.1 dropped real-estate listings from the universal layer, bringing the live total to 22 mandatory + 6 universal = 28; v2.6.2 adds Funnels as the 23rd mandatory dept, restoring the total to 23 mandatory + 6 universal = 29 — coincidentally the same total as the pre-v2.6.1 7-universal era, for an unrelated reason.)

marketing.one_liner: Getting the word out about your business
marketing.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for brand awareness, demand generation, or getting your name in front of new people

sales.one_liner: Turning interested people into paying customers
sales.loss_warning: nobody owns turning interested leads into paying customers — outreach, follow-up, and closing go unmanaged

billing-finance.loss_warning: invoices, collections, and expense chasing won't have a dedicated owner

customer-support.one_liner: Helping your existing customers when they need it
customer-support.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for answering existing customers, onboarding, or handling refunds

web-development.one_liner: Your website, funnels, landing pages, SEO
web-development.loss_warning: your website, funnels, landing pages, and SEO have no dedicated owner to build or maintain them

funnels.one_liner: Building, verifying, and shipping the GHL sales funnels Skill 6 creates for you
funnels.v2_6_2_note: Added as mandatory in v2.6.2 (2026-07-16, operator ruling) — closes the live Skill-6 job_type='funnel' misroute to general-task on a standard floor. See funnels-suggested-roles.md for the deliberate, documented overlap with Marketing's and Web Development's own funnel-adjacent roles.
funnels.loss_warning: no dedicated owner receives or works the automated GHL funnel-build queue Skill 6 creates — funnel cards silently misroute to the general catch-all instead of a real department

app-development.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for desktop, mobile, or web-app builds

graphics.one_liner: Visual content — logos, images, ads, slides
graphics.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for logos, social graphics, slides, or ad creative — visuals get outsourced or skipped

video.one_liner: Video production, editing, AI video, YouTube optimization
video.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for video production, editing, YouTube, or short-form clips

audio.one_liner: Podcasts, voiceovers, AI voice, music, sound design
audio.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for podcasts, voiceovers, AI voice, or sound design

research.one_liner: Market research, competitor analysis, data insights
research.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for market research, competitor analysis, or data-backed insights before you decide

communications.one_liner: PR, announcements, internal and external messaging
communications.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for PR, announcements, or internal and external messaging

crm.one_liner: Manages your contact management, email, automations
crm.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for your contact database, email automations, or deliverability

openclaw-maintenance.one_liner: Keeps your AI system healthy and up to date
openclaw-maintenance.loss_warning: nobody keeps your AI system healthy, updated, backed up, or secure — problems surface only when something breaks

legal.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for contracts, compliance, terms, or protecting you from risk

social-media.one_liner: Organic posting and community across all platforms
social-media.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for organic posting or community across your platforms

paid-advertisement.one_liner: Paid ads across every platform — search, social, audio
paid-advertisement.loss_warning: no dedicated owner for paid ads — campaigns, budgets, and targeting go unmanaged

personal-assistant.one_liner: Inbox, scheduling, travel, personal life — the owner's right hand
personal-assistant.v2_3_note: Promoted to mandatory in v10.15.42 (Skill 42 PA Library approved). Raises the universal floor to 24 departments.
personal-assistant.loss_warning: no right-hand owner for your inbox, scheduling, travel, or personal-life logistics

general-task.one_liner: Catches any task that doesn't fit a dedicated department, so nothing is ever dropped
general-task.loss_warning: the catch-all safety net is gone — a task that fits no other department can be dropped instead of routed somewhere

project-architecture-office.one_liner: Governs every project from trigger to verifiable completion — creates PRDs, runs loops, hands off to building departments
project-architecture-office.loss_warning: no owner governs multi-step projects end to end; work can start without a plan and stall without verified completion

bugs.one_liner: The front desk and medical records for every defect: logs, triages, dedupes, and tracks every bug to verified closure
bugs.loss_warning: defects aren't logged, triaged, or tracked to closure — the same problem can recur with no record

healer.one_liner: The company doctors: root-cause diagnosis, fix-forward, SOP surgery, and teachings so the same bug never happens twice
healer.loss_warning: no self-repair function; when something breaks there's no root-cause diagnosis or SOP fix so it won't recur

quality-control.one_liner: Owns and operates the system analyzer: holds every other department's roles and procedures to the standard on two axes (is it real, is it specific enough to follow) and routes the failures it finds to the Healer
quality-control.loss_warning: no function holds your other departments' work to the standard (is it real, is it specific enough to follow) before it ships
